actions.script: var googleBtn = document.querySelector('div.chakra-button[aria-label="Google"]') || document.querySelector('button:has(div[aria-label="Google"])') || document.querySelector('button:has(img[alt="Google logo"])'); if (googleBtn) { if (googleBtn.tagName.toLowerCase() === 'button') { googleBtn.click(); } else { var parentBtn = googleBtn.closest('button'); if (parentBtn) { parentBtn.click(); } else { googleBtn.click(); } } return 'google_clicked'; } return 'google_not_found';

if ('${google_click}' === 'google_clicked') { await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 5000)); var account = document.querySelector('div[data-identifier][role="link"]') || document.querySelector('div[data-identifier]') || document.querySelector('.VV3oRb[role="link"]') || document.querySelector('div[data-email]'); if (account) { account.click(); return 'account_clicked'; } return 'account_not_found'; } return 'google_not_clicked';

if ('${account_click}' === 'account_clicked') { await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 10000)); return 'login_complete'; } else if ('${account_click}' === 'account_not_found') { await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 5000)); var account = document.querySelector('div[data-identifier][role="link"]') || document.querySelector('div[data-identifier]') || document.querySelector('.VV3oRb[role="link"]') || document.querySelector('div[data-email]'); if (account) { account.click(); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 10000)); return 'account_clicked_retry'; } return 'account_not_found_retry'; } return 'skipped';
